inputs.label: P(A) - Prior Probability
inputs.businessContext: Base rate or prevalence of the condition (between 0 and 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Base rate or prevalence of the condition (between 0 and 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Durumun temel oranı veya yaygınlığı (0 ile 1 arasında)
businessContext_i18n.de: Grundrate oder Prävalenz der Erkrankung (zwischen 0 und 1)

inputs.label: P(B|A) - Sensitivity
inputs.businessContext: True positive rate: probability of a positive test given condition present (between 0 and 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: True positive rate: probability of a positive test given condition present (between 0 and 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek pozitif oranı: durum varken pozitif test olasılığı (0 ile 1 arasında)
businessContext_i18n.de: Richtig-Positiv-Rate: Wahrscheinlichkeit eines positiven Tests bei Vorliegen der Erkrankung (zwischen 0 und 1)

inputs.label: P(¬B|¬A) - Specificity
inputs.businessContext: True negative rate: probability of a negative test given condition absent (between 0 and 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: True negative rate: probability of a negative test given condition absent (between 0 and 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek negatif oranı: durum yokken negatif test olasılığı (0 ile 1 arasında)
businessContext_i18n.de: Richtig-Negativ-Rate: Wahrscheinlichkeit eines negativen Tests bei Abwesenheit der Erkrankung (zwischen 0 und 1)

inputs.label: Test Result (1=Positive, 0=Negative)
inputs.businessContext: Indicate whether the observed test result is positive (1) or negative (0).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicate whether the observed test result is positive (1) or negative (0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen test sonucunun pozitif (1) mi yoksa negatif (0) mı olduğunu belirtin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie an, ob das beobachtete Testergebnis positiv (1) oder negativ (0) ist.

formulas.denominator: testResult == 1 ? (sensitivity * prior + falsePositiveRate * (1 - prior)) : (falseNegativeRate * prior + specificity * (1 - prior))
formulas.posterior: testResult == 1 ? (sensitivity * prior) / (sensitivity * prior + falsePositiveRate * (1 - prior)) : (falseNegativeRate * prior) / (falseNegativeRate * prior + specificity * (1 - prior))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
